source_pr.title: ddl/dist: gc subtask history table
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/46722

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

1. move all subtask of finished task to subtask_history table
2. gc subtask_history after 14 days
3. keep same between subtask table and subtask history table

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [x] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)

```sql
mysql> alter table test.tdata add index idx(a);
Query OK, 0 rows affected (5.43 sec)

mysql> select * from tidb_background_subtask;
Empty set (0.00 sec)

mysql> select * from tidb_background_subtask_history;
+----+------+-----------+----------+------------------+------+----------------+--------------+---------+------------+------------+-------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------+---------+
| id | step | namespace | task_key | ddl_physical_tid | type | exec_id        | exec_expired | state   | checkpoint | start_time | state_update_time | meta                                                                                                        | error | summary |
+----+------+-----------+----------+------------------+------+----------------+--------------+---------+------------+------------+-------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------+---------+
|  1 |    1 |           | 1        |                0 |    0 | 127.0.0.1:4000 | NULL         | succeed |            | 1693995594 |        1693995594 | {"physical_table_id":0,"start_key":"dIAAAAAAAABiX3KAAAAAAAAAAQ==","end_key":"dIAAAAAAAABiX3KAAAAAAAAAAQA="} |       | {}      |
|  2 |    2 |           | 1        |                0 |    0 | 127.0.0.1:4000 | NULL         | succeed |            | 1693995597 |        1693995597 | {"physical_table_id":0,"start_key":null,"end_key":null}                                                     |       | {}      |
+----+------+-----------+----------+------------------+------+----------------+--------------+---------+------------+------------+-------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------+---------+
2 rows in set (0.01 sec)
```

- [ ] No code

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
For distributed DDL, its subtask record will be moved from `tidb_background_subtask` to `tidb_background_subtask_history` when it finish. And the subtask in `tidb_background_subtask_history` will be deleted after 14 days to release space.
```

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to concurrency races or unsynchronized shared state. Asynchronous state transitions need polling/Eventually-style checks. This PR stabilizes it by: race = "on",.

evidence: files: ddl/constant.go, ddl/job_table.go, disttask/framework/BUILD.bazel, disttask/framework/dispatcher/dispatcher.go, disttask/framework/dispatcher/dispatcher_manager.go, disttask/framework/framework_test.go, disttask/framework/mock/scheduler_mock.go, disttask/framework/scheduler/interface.go, disttask/framework/scheduler/scheduler.go, disttask/framework/scheduler/scheduler_test.go, disttask/framework/storage/BUILD.bazel, disttask/framework/storage/table_test.go, disttask/framework/storage/task_table.go, disttask/framework/storage/util.go, disttask/importinto/dispatcher_testkit_test.go, disttask/importinto/job.go, session/bootstrap.go, session/bootstraptest/BUILD.bazel, session/bootstraptest/bootstrap_upgrade_test.go, tests/realtikvtest/importintotest/job_test.go, tests/realtikvtest/importintotest4/split_file_test.go

analysis:

Triage summary: race = "on",

Patch series analyzed; see patch_url.
